mapper.sql: c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.content, c.status, c.like_count, c.created_at, c.updated_at, p.title AS post_title, u.username AS username, ru.username AS reply_to_username
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN users ru ON ru.id = c.reply_to_user_id WHERE c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN users ru ON ru.id = c.reply_to_user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = 'VISIBLE' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status IN ('VISIBLE', 'DELETED')

SELECT
FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN users ru ON ru.id = c.reply_to_user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status IN ('VISIBLE', 'DELETED') ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('VISIBLE', 'DELETED')

SELECT
FROM comments c INNER JOIN posts p ON p.id = c.post_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN users ru ON ru.id = c.reply_to_user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status IN ('VISIBLE', 'DELETED') ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
